product_overview: Ecosurf App is a mobile-first PWA for surf communities to explore coastal conditions, contribute photo-based surf reports, and publish environmental alerts and mutirões. It combines a daily radar, territorial map, and profile-based contributions with privacy and locality controls.
core_goals: Let users quickly register photos of surf conditions and environmental incidents.
Help users discover active surf spots and recent community contributions.
Enable publishing of environmental alerts and mutirões on a territorial map.
Support trust and locality through provenance labels and visibility controls.
Provide a public exploration mode and a logged-in contribution mode.
Allow the app to be installed and used as a PWA.

features.name: Public exploration and entry
features.description: New visitors can open the app, explore public content, and decide whether to contribute with an account.
user_flows: Open the app -> Choose to explore first -> View public Radar content -> View public Map content -> Observe that publishing actions require login

features.name: Authentication and profile setup
features.description: Users can create an account and complete an OTP-based login flow followed by profile setup and permissions.
user_flows: Choose to create an account and contribute -> Enter an email address -> Request an access code -> Enter the numeric code -> Fill in name, CPF, and city -> Optionally add a main surf spot and profile photo -> Grant camera and location access -> See the logged-in Radar

features.name: Radar dashboard
features.description: Users can review the daily radar, see recent spot activity, browse feed filters, and find spots with no photo for the day.
user_flows: Open Radar -> View the compact map and recent spot stories -> Change the feed filter between favorites, best waves, and all -> Review spots without a photo for the day -> Open a spot from the feed or map

features.name: Spot page and timeline
features.description: Users can open a surf spot page to inspect current conditions, daily photo timeline, freshness labels, provenance labels, and social actions.
user_flows: Open a spot from Radar or Map -> Review the current condition summary -> Inspect the daily timeline positioned over the tide curve -> Move through moments on the timeline slider -> Like a photo -> Share a photo -> Report a photo

features.name: Photo and surf report publishing
features.description: Users can capture or select an image, attach it to the nearest spot or a chosen spot, classify it as a surf report, and publish it.
user_flows: Start a quick photo capture -> Capture or select an image -> Confirm the nearest spot or choose a spot manually -> Classify the post as a surf report -> Add observations -> Publish the report -> See the spot highlighted on Radar and the photo added to the timeline

features.name: Environmental alert publishing
features.description: Users can create a multi-step environmental alert with category, evidence, location, severity, and description, then publish it publicly.
user_flows: Open Actions -> Start a new action -> Choose environmental alert -> Select a category -> Add evidence -> Confirm location and city/state -> Set severity -> Write a description -> Review and publish -> See the alert on the Map and on the spot page

features.name: Mutirão creation
features.description: Users can create a community mutirão with event details, volunteer information, and a cover image.
user_flows: Open Actions -> Start a new action -> Choose mutirão -> Fill in the type, title, and description -> Add the location -> Set the date and time -> Add organization and volunteer details -> Add a cover image -> Publish the mutirão -> See it on the Map and in the Actions area

features.name: Map territory browsing
features.description: Users can explore the territorial map, switch layers, zoom clusters, and open the related spot or action from a marker panel.
user_flows: Open Map -> Switch between spots, alerts, and mutirões layers -> Zoom into a cluster -> View individual markers -> Open the related page from the bottom panel

features.name: Drafts and resume
features.description: Users can save an in-progress alert or mutirão as a draft and return later to continue publishing it.
user_flows: Start an environmental alert or mutirão -> Save it as a draft -> Leave the Actions area -> Return later to Actions -> Open the saved draft -> Continue editing -> Publish it

features.name: Profile and visibility management
features.description: Users can view their profile, review stats and history, and manage privacy and visibility preferences including public, community, and muted spot visibility.
user_flows: Open Profile -> View account statistics and history -> Review privacy and LGPD preferences -> Open a spot with community or muted visibility -> Observe that sensitive real-time details are not exposed to unauthorized users

features.name: PWA installation
features.description: Users can install the app to their device and open it in standalone mode.
user_flows: Open the app in a supported browser -> Choose to add the app to the home screen -> Launch the installed app -> See it open in standalone mode

features: Creation of environmental alerts and actions
